description_long: This object is a rectangular loaf-style cake with a golden-yellow, spongy texture on its sides and a smooth, slightly browned top surface. The cake appears to have a uniform, dense crumb with a subtle gradient of color from the base to the top, suggesting a well-baked finish. The top is flat and unadorned, with no visible icing, decorations, or toppings. The sides show a soft, porous structure typical of sponge or castella cakes, with a slightly darker edge where the cake met the baking pan. There are no visible layers, fillings, or embellishments, giving it a minimalist and homemade appearance. The cake is not displayed on any plate or tray and appears to be a single, solid block.
description: A rectangular, golden-yellow loaf cake with a smooth, browned top and plain, spongy sides. The cake is undecorated and has a soft, dense texture.
description_view_0: The short end of the cake, showing the golden, spongy side and the flat, browned top edge.
description_view_1: The long side of the cake, highlighting the even, porous crumb and the smooth, brown top surface.
description_view_2: The opposite short end, similar to view 0, with the same golden, spongy texture and flat top.
description_view_3: The opposite long side, mirroring view 1, with a consistent crumb and browned top.
